report.summary: Built 2 new learn guides: Crypto Staking Guide 2026 and Flash Loans in DeFi Guide 2026, with full SEO optimization and structured data.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Crypto Staking 2026: PoS staking yields range 3-20% APY across major chains. Top performers: Cosmos (15-20%), Polkadot (12-15%), NEAR (9-11%). Liquid staking dominates with Lido ($30B+ TVL) and Rocket Pool ($28B+ TVL). Key distinction: nominal APY vs real yield after inflation.

Flash Loans in DeFi 2026: Aave pioneered uncollateralized flash loans, processing $7.5B+ in 2025 volume and crossing $1T cumulative in Feb 2026. Loans must be repaid within a single atomic transaction. Fee: 0.05% on Aave. Primary use cases: arbitrage, debt refinancing, liquidations. Notable risk: flash loan attacks via oracle manipulation.

sections.title: Content Created
items: Crypto Staking Guide 2026 (~3,100 lines): 9-section comprehensive guide covering PoS mechanics, staking types (native/delegated/liquid/exchange), APY comparison tables, platform comparison, liquid staking deep dive, risk mitigation, and step-by-step tutorials. Beginner-friendly with DeFi badge.

Flash Loans in DeFi Guide 2026 (~2,800 lines): 9-section advanced guide covering atomic transaction mechanics, protocol comparison (Aave/dYdX/Balancer/Uniswap), use cases with worked arbitrage examples, attack vectors and defenses, fee economics table, technical overview with pseudocode, and future outlook. Advanced difficulty with DeFi badge.

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Crypto Staking: title 'Crypto Staking Guide 2026 — Earn Passive Income | degen0x', target keyword 'crypto staking guide', Article+FAQPage schema with 6 FAQs, OG/Twitter cards, internal links to liquid-staking-tokens, restaking-eigenlayer, yield-farming guides

Flash Loans: title 'Flash Loans in DeFi Guide 2026 — How They Work | degen0x', target keyword 'flash loans DeFi', Article+FAQPage schema with 6 FAQs, OG/Twitter cards, internal links to crypto-lending-borrowing, mev-protection, dex-aggregators, yield-farming guides
Both pages added to PUBLISH_QUEUE in published-pages.ts under April 2, 2026 Build Cycle
